rules.rule: All NuGet packages must use Semantic Versioning: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.
MAJOR for breaking changes; MINOR for new features; PATCH for bug fixes.
Breaking broker contract changes must use the SPAL strategy: introduce new method alongside old, deprecate old, remove only after migration.
RESTful API version must be expressed in the URL path: /api/v{n}/{resource}. Query-string and header versioning must not be used.
Every package release must have a CHANGELOG or release notes entry.
